name: scp-db-viewer
description: SCP Foundation Database Viewer — Terminal Edition

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js --platform=node --format=cjs --external:electron && esbuild src/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife && copyfiles -f src/pages/*.html dist/pages/ && copyfiles -f src/components/styles/*.css dist/components/styles/ && copyfiles -f src/components/images/*.png dist/components/images/
scripts.dev: esbuild src/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js --platform=node --format=cjs --external:electron && copyfiles -f src/pages/*.html dist/pages/ && copyfiles -f src/components/styles/*.css dist/components/styles/ && copyfiles -f src/components/images/*.png dist/components/images/ && electron .
